title_tesim: Preface to a testament, origin unknown, undated
summary_tesim: Presumed to be a preface to a testament, with extensive praise of the Virgin. Includes a marginal note, in Spanish, regarding a contract for renting land between Ilario Carrillo and Diego Joseph De Lares.
dlcs_collection_name_ssm: Byron McAfee Papers (Collection 339). UCLA Library Special Collections, Charles E. Young Research Library.

title_tesim: Contract for sale of land, San Felipe Santiago, Azcapotzalco
summary_tesim: Bartolome Fabian and Bartolome de Vargas and Hilario Blas, of San Felipe Santiago Atzcapotzalco, sell a piece of land to D. Antonio Gonzalez Tercero, a Spaniard. Apoderado is Juan Soriano; signed by D. Hipolto Hernandez, notary. Mentions boundary dispute between the towns of Azcapotzalco and Villatlacopa. Stamp of King Philip V.
dlcs_collection_name_ssm: Byron McAfee Papers (Collection 339). UCLA Library Special Collections, Charles E. Young Research Library.

title_tesim: Contract for sale of land, Azcapotzalco
summary_tesim: Purchase of land by Don Juan Soriano, Spaniard, from Juan de la Cruz, of San Lucas Atenco, and Maria Simona of San Sebastian. Signed by Antonio Bilibaldo Flores, notary. Stamp of King Philip V on recto and verso.
dlcs_collection_name_ssm: Byron McAfee Papers (Collection 339). UCLA Library Special Collections, Charles E. Young Research Library.

title_tesim: Account summary for Diego Francisco, San Mateo, Huitzilopochco
summary_tesim: Account of money received by Diego Francisco from various people.
dlcs_collection_name_ssm: Byron McAfee Papers (Collection 339). UCLA Library Special Collections, Charles E. Young Research Library.

summary_tesim: Final will and testament, with instructions for mass, burial, and the division of property. Signed by Joseph Jacabo, scribe. Second leaf is a record of Lorenco de la Assumpción receiving 6 pesos from Francisco de Santo Domingo, for the two masses ordered in the will.
dlcs_collection_name_ssm: Byron McAfee Papers (Collection 339). UCLA Library Special Collections, Charles E. Young Research Library.

summary_tesim: Will of a woman dying from "cocoliztli," or smallpox. Will includes a prayer, instructions for mass and burial, and directions regarding her house and division of property.
dlcs_collection_name_ssm: Byron McAfee Papers (Collection 339). UCLA Library Special Collections, Charles E. Young Research Library.

summary_tesim: Flores was a resident of Santo Domingo Pixcohuac. Will includes instructions for mass and burial, and directions for the division of property.
dlcs_collection_name_ssm: Byron McAfee Papers (Collection 339). UCLA Library Special Collections, Charles E. Young Research Library.

title_tesim: Land title for Pedro Tadeo and Maria Nolasco, Puebla de Los Angeles[?]
summary_tesim: Confirmation of ownership for a piece of land for Pedro Tadeo and his wife, Maria Nolasco. On the verso is a notation dated 1766 August 22, stating that the document was sold to Juan Hernando Casco by Blas de Santiago, a mestizo, for 4 reales. Stamp of King Philip V on recto.
dlcs_collection_name_ssm: Byron McAfee Papers (Collection 339). UCLA Library Special Collections, Charles E. Young Research Library.

title_tesim: Contract for sale of land, Atzcapotzalco, 1738
summary_tesim: Land purchase by Don Juan Soriano and his wife, Doña Manuela Antonia y Garcia, from Phelipe de Santiago, a widower of Josepha de la Encarnacíon, of San Simon Pochtlan. Mentions testament of Don Pascual de los Reyes.
dlcs_collection_name_ssm: Byron McAfee Papers (Collection 339). UCLA Library Special Collections, Charles E. Young Research Library.

title_tesim: Contract for sale of land, Azcapotzalco, 1735
summary_tesim: Land purchase by Antonio Gonzalez from Jacinto Ventura. Ventura received the land as an inheritance from his sister, Anxelina Maria.
dlcs_collection_name_ssm: Byron McAfee Papers (Collection 339). UCLA Library Special Collections, Charles E. Young Research Library.

title_tesim: Contract for sale of land, Azcapotzalco, 1737
summary_tesim: Purchase of land by Don Antonio Gonzalez Tercero, presumably from the municipal council.
dlcs_collection_name_ssm: Byron McAfee Papers (Collection 339). UCLA Library Special Collections, Charles E. Young Research Library.

title_tesim: Contract for sale of land, San Juan Bautista, Metepec
summary_tesim: Includes an original 1726 contract, in Nahuatl, and an 1810 certification of the sale, in Spanish. Purchase of land by Don Juan de los Santos from Son Cruz de los Santos Castañeda and his wife, Doña Barbara Severina. Stamped.
dlcs_collection_name_ssm: Byron McAfee Papers (Collection 339). UCLA Library Special Collections, Charles E. Young Research Library.

title_tesim: Contract for sale of land, San Juan Bautista, Metepec
summary_tesim: Purchase of land by Don Juan Soriano and his wife, Doña Manuela Antonia y Garcia, from Francisca Maria, a widow, of San Simon Pochtla, and her son Santiago Cristobal. Mentions the will of Don Pascual de los Reyes, "notlazotatzin."
dlcs_collection_name_ssm: Byron McAfee Papers (Collection 339). UCLA Library Special Collections, Charles E. Young Research Library.

title_tesim: Contract for sale of land, Atzcapotzalco, 1738
summary_tesim: Purchase of land by Don Juan Soriano and his wife, Doña Manuela Antonia y Garcia, from Marco Antonio and his wife, Maria Teresa of San Simon Pochtlan. Mentions testament of Don Pascual de los Reyes.
dlcs_collection_name_ssm: Byron McAfee Papers (Collection 339). UCLA Library Special Collections, Charles E. Young Research Library.

title_tesim: Testament of Pedro Cayetano, San Juan Bautista, Metepec
summary_tesim: Final will and testament, with mention of his wife, Maura Maria.
dlcs_collection_name_ssm: Byron McAfee Papers (Collection 339). UCLA Library Special Collections, Charles E. Young Research Library.

title_tesim: Testament of Maria Teresa, San Juan Bautista, Metepec
summary_tesim: Final will and testament of Maria Teresa, widow of Juan de los Santos, from Santa Cruz Tianguistenco. Signed by Simon de la Cruz, scribe.
dlcs_collection_name_ssm: Byron McAfee Papers (Collection 339). UCLA Library Special Collections, Charles E. Young Research Library.

title_tesim: Testament of Juan Pablo and Catalina Ursula, San Juan Bautista, Metepec
summary_tesim: Final will and testament of a man and his wife. Signed by Thomas Joseph, scribe.
dlcs_collection_name_ssm: Byron McAfee Papers (Collection 339). UCLA Library Special Collections, Charles E. Young Research Library.

title_tesim: Testimony regarding certification of land, San Lucas, Tlacochcalco
summary_tesim: Testimony taken by Juan Hilario Hernandez regarding a piece of land.
dlcs_collection_name_ssm: Byron McAfee Papers (Collection 339). UCLA Library Special Collections, Charles E. Young Research Library.

title_tesim: Estate summary for Juana and Gabriel Rafael, Coyoacan[?]
summary_tesim: Summary statement, possibly by an executor, for Juana (d. 1629 March 21) and her husband, Gabriel Rafael (d. ca. 1630). Includes the cost of their masses and settlement of property.
dlcs_collection_name_ssm: Byron McAfee Papers (Collection 339). UCLA Library Special Collections, Charles E. Young Research Library.

title_tesim: Testament of Maria Teresa and Estevan Domingo, Santa Cruz, Tianguistenco
summary_tesim: Will of Estevan Domingo and his wife (possibly widow), Maria Teresa. Signed by Simon Narcisco b Allino, notary.
dlcs_collection_name_ssm: Byron McAfee Papers (Collection 339). UCLA Library Special Collections, Charles E. Young Research Library.

title_tesim: Contracts for sale of land, et. al], Atzcapotzalco 1766 April 28-1804 December 6.
Contracts for sale of land, Atzcapotzalco
summary_tesim: Documentation regarding the lands of Angelina Maria in San Simon Pochutla (See MS 4). Includes reference to Phelipe de Santiago and other names, and lands in San Domingo. Stamp of King Philip V on all leaves.
dlcs_collection_name_ssm: Byron McAfee Papers (Collection 339). UCLA Library Special Collections, Charles E. Young Research Library.

description_tesim: 1 bifolium : paper ; 312 x 210 mm. Final will and testament. Contains instructions for burial, and directions for the division of his land and property. Signed by witnesses and a notary. Text in Nahuatl. (Anderson, 72)
1 leaf : 307 x 212 mm. Formal acknowledgement of the legitimate birth of Maria Teresa Antonia Dominga Diega de Jesus. Stamp and embossed seal at top of leaf. Text in Spanish

title_tesim: Contract for sale of land, Atzcapotzalco, 1738
summary_tesim: Purchase of land by Don Juan Soriano and his wife, Doña Manuela Antonio y Garcia from Andres de los Reyes and his wife, Luisa Francisco, of San Simon Pochtlan. Sale appears to be the result of the testament of Don Pascual de los Reyes, taken in 1732 September 4. Stamp of King Philip V on recto.
dlcs_collection_name_ssm: Byron McAfee Papers (Collection 339). UCLA Library Special Collections, Charles E. Young Research Library.

title_tesim: Contract for transfer of land, Tlalxopa, Coyohuacan
summary_tesim: ransfer of land from Miguel de Santiago to Francisco de Leon Carvajal. Includes a map-like drawing of the property in ink, "cedula del pedazo de tierra que me dio lorenzo y lo di a la biexa de Xochac en truxe que de otro que ella me troco."
dlcs_collection_name_ssm: Byron McAfee Papers (Collection 339). UCLA Library Special Collections, Charles E. Young Research Library.

title_tesim: Testament of Ana Lucia, San Geronimo, Zacamahcuexpa
summary_tesim: Woman's will. Signed by Juan Gaspar, scribe.
dlcs_collection_name_ssm: Byron McAfee Papers (Collection 339). UCLA Library Special Collections, Charles E. Young Research Library.

title_tesim: Statement of Maria Ana, Tetzala Purificacion
summary_tesim: Statement taken near time of death.
dlcs_collection_name_ssm: Byron McAfee Papers (Collection 339). UCLA Library Special Collections, Charles E. Young Research Library.

title_tesim: [Petition for removal of the priest of Jalostotitlan], Guadalajara 1611 December 16-1612 January 10.
dlcs_collection_name_ssm: Byron McAfee Papers (Collection 339). UCLA Library Special Collections, Charles E. Young Research Library.
description_tesim: 14 leaves : paper ; 315 x 216 mm. Criminal complaint brought by Juan Vicente, alcalde, and Miguel López against Francisco Muñoz Bohorques, cura of Xalostotitlan. Questionnaire, in Nahuatl, ff. 1-3; Spanish translation, ff. 4-7; testimony, in Spanish, ff. 8-13v. Complaint includes charges of the cura's illicit relationship with a woman, violence against and beatings of native peoples, and coercive acts with Spanish officials. (Anderson, 166)

title_tesim: [Land title for Maria Juan], San Felipe Santiago, Azcapotzalco 1697 April 4.
description_tesim: 1 bifolium : paper, ill. ; 310 x 212. Statement of possession for Maria Juan of San Pedro Atenco Xococalco. Property was inherited from her mother, Francisca Maria. Illustrated with an ink drawing of a house, crops, and property boundaries, showing the location of the land with reference to Azcapotzalco and Xococalco. Text in Nahuatl.

title_tesim: [Testament of Angelina], San Simón Pochtlan 1695 August 16.
description_tesim: 1 leaf : paper ; 315 x 220 mm. Final will and testament. Contains instructions for mass, and the division of land and property among her grandchildren and son-in-law. Signed by notary and witnesses. Manuscript has been conserved to stabilize the paper. Text in Nahuatl. (Anderson, 68)
1 leaf : paper ; 215 x 154 mm. Fragment of a catechism, including an analysis of the Lord's Prayer. Beginning of lines alternate between "ten" and "tetl."

title_tesim: [Contract for sale of land, et. al], Azcapotzalco 1738 December 15
Petition against Fray Juan de Vizcarre, Guaxicori and Guadalajara
summary_tesim: Assorted documents "contra el Pe Fr Juan de Vizcarre, guardian del convente de San Francisco" (f. 1r). Includes petitions, letters, and testimony of Sebastian Garcia against Vizcarre. Second half of manuscript is comprised of copies of documents from civil and ecclesiastical authorities, including the execution of his sentence and exile from the parish. Final leaf is unrelated to the case, and is an edict of the Governor and alcaldes of Atzapotzalco, 1569 January 14.
dlcs_collection_name_ssm: Byron McAfee Papers (Collection 339). UCLA Library Special Collections, Charles E. Young Research Library.

title_tesim: Contract for sale of land, San Juan Bautista, Metepec
summary_tesim: Purchase of land by Doña Gertrudis Perez de Bustamante from Doña Antonia, her husband Miguel Martinez de Miranda, and their son, Julian Roman Martinez de Miranda. Leaf 2 is a confirmation of the sale of the land on 1767 July 1 from Gertrudis to Agustina Veronica of Chalco. Stamp of King Philip V.
dlcs_collection_name_ssm: Byron McAfee Papers (Collection 339). UCLA Library Special Collections, Charles E. Young Research Library.

title_tesim: Petition by the people of Coatlan de Puertos Abaxo, Coatlan
summary_tesim: Petition charging mistreatment by the hands of the curate, Antonio Bautista. Received by the Bishop of Guadalajara, don Leonel de Cervantes y Carvajal.
dlcs_collection_name_ssm: Byron McAfee Papers (Collection 339). UCLA Library Special Collections, Charles E. Young Research Library.

title_tesim: Contract for sale of land, et al., San Felipe Santiago, Atzcapotzalco Tianguistenco
summary_tesim: Series of manuscripts relating to various transfers of ownership for a piece of land. First document is a sales contract involving don Felipe Felisiano and his wife Pasquala Maria, and members of their family. The land was located in the barrio Santo Domingo, and the seller was don Antonio de Santiago and his wife, Doña Maria Francisca. Remaining documents date from 1738, when the land in question was sold to Bartolome Vargas and his family. Signatures of witnesses throughout. Leaves 5 and 6 are blank; all leaves bear the stamp of King Philip V.
dlcs_collection_name_ssm: Byron McAfee Papers (Collection 339). UCLA Library Special Collections, Charles E. Young Research Library.

description_tesim: Contains arrangements of airs from operas by A. Campra (2), P. Collasse (1), H. Desmarets (2), A.C. Destouches (2), and J.B. Lully (56); airs and airs à boire for voices (1-3) and instrumental pieces by L.A. Dornel (2) and unidentified composers (111).
Includes several published pieces bound with manuscript.
Edition statement: 2e edition, revue en corrigée. Partition
Bookplate of Laura E. Burmeister on paste-down of upper cover.
Attached to the recto of the back flyleaf is a single fascicle (15 x 21 cm) containing a treble part to various pieces.
f.27r has been ruled with staves but is unnotated; it includes 4 verses, presumably for a strophic song, with text incipit: "Im Glück und Unglück einerley."
On paste-down of upper cover, ink, written upside-down: "Ludens / Arns Vonbargon / Hans Han Lucas / Vitzen."
On recto of front flyleaf, upper right corner: "M. J. D. Busfæus. [space] 1776."
Original pagination 1-29 from f.1v-15v; f.16r not paginated, f.16v-69v paginated 30-130.
Former Owners: Vonbargon, Ludens Arns; Vitzen, Hans Han Lucas; Busfæus, M. J. D.; Burmeister, Laura E.; Finney, Theodore M.
Some vocal selections in German; some in Italian.
